request_payload.exposure_text: 🚨 Did you hear about the recent security lapses in our cities? Foreign agents are exploiting weak domestic security laws to plan attacks. We can't afford to wait - it's time to empower our agencies to act decisively. Remember, when our security forces are held back by outdated rules, we're all at risk. #SecureOurFuture #StrongDefense
